_comment: CalcCorrectGraph saturation curves — EXACT datamined game params (not modeled). Each point: {stat, growth, adjPt}. Between points a,b: growth = a.growth + (b.growth-a.growth) * ratio^a.adjPt, where ratio=(stat-a.stat)/(b.stat-a.stat); if adjPt<0 use 1-(1-ratio)^(-adjPt). See docs/01-damage-formula.md.
_source: Datamined CalcCorrectGraph (game regulation). graph 0 = physical (STR/DEX), graph 4 = elemental (INT/FAI), graph 6 = arcane status buildup.
_curveSelection: Curves are keyed by DAMAGE TYPE, not by scaling stat [CONFIRMED] — e.g. Arcane scaling a weapon's fire/magic/lightning/holy damage (Rivers of Blood's fire) uses the elemental curve, even though Arcane's effect on physical AR uses the physical curve. See engine.js TYPE_CURVE.
_scalingTiers_note: scaling coefficient -> displayed grade. coefficient = attributeScaling value (e.g. 0.825 -> C). Datamined.
